system.requirement: Once you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.287bb4c2b53ea847]{Forge a Bond} (formidable or greater) with a leader of a faction...

abilities.description: You are trusted and authorized to speak on your leader's behalf. When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage} by leveraging your faction's resources, add +1. When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.9f538fabf8998c5b]{Compel}, another member of your faction, you may reroll one die. If you lose your connection to your leader, take 1 experience per marked ability and discard this asset.

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.3de42d2d3cb78855]{Sojourn} or @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.VIHnILz9rKlGyRZ1]{Make Camp} in the company of your faction, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.

When you @Compendium[starforged-custom-oracles.starforgedcustommoves.Item.2f2ba4090b22a122]{Enter the Fray} boldly bearing the emblem of your faction, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit. When you burn momentum leading your faction in combat, take +1 momentum after you reset.
